description: Verified field catalog collected from static tables and IDA-backed call-site analysis

fields.name: condition_start
fields.notes: Start index into EVTCONDBASE.

fields.name: condition_count
fields.notes: Number of EVTCONDBASE rows attached to the event.

fields.name: data_start
fields.notes: Start index into eventdata.dat records.

fields.name: command_count
fields.notes: Number of eventdata.dat records consumed by the event.

fields.name: flags
fields.notes: Event flags byte; bit 2 is checked when marking completion.

fields.name: opcode
fields.notes: Dispatches into the 78-case event opcode switch.

fields.name: arg0
fields.notes: Runtime argument byte 0; meaning depends on opcode.

fields.name: arg1
fields.notes: Runtime argument word 1; meaning depends on opcode.

fields.name: param
fields.notes: Runtime parameter dword.

fields.name: text_id
fields.notes: Memorytext id resolved into the runtime text pointer.

fields.name: flag_bit_0
fields.notes: Consulted inside the alternate pre-dispatch path entered when flag_bit_1 is set.

fields.name: flag_bit_1
fields.notes: Routes opcode handling through the alternate pre-dispatch path when EVT info bit0 is set.

fields.name: dice_slot_0
fields.notes: One of the six dice value slots consumed by STATUSDICE_Roll*.

fields.name: dice_slot_1
fields.notes: One of the six dice value slots consumed by STATUSDICE_Roll*.

fields.name: dice_slot_2
fields.notes: One of the six dice value slots consumed by STATUSDICE_Roll*.

fields.name: dice_slot_3
fields.notes: One of the six dice value slots consumed by STATUSDICE_Roll*.

fields.name: dice_slot_4
fields.notes: One of the six dice value slots consumed by STATUSDICE_Roll*.

fields.name: dice_slot_5
fields.notes: One of the six dice value slots consumed by STATUSDICE_Roll*.

fields.name: monster_u8_0x05
fields.notes: Consumed directly from MONDATABASE+0x05.

fields.name: monster_u8_0x06
fields.notes: Consumed directly from MONDATABASE+0x06.

fields.name: monster_u32_0x07
fields.notes: Consumed directly from MONDATABASE+0x07.

fields.name: monster_u16_0x0B
fields.notes: Consumed directly from MONDATABASE+0x0B.

fields.name: monster_scaled_u8_0x0F
fields.notes: Converted into stat output by CHAR_UpdateAttrFromMonster.

fields.name: monster_scaled_u8_0x10
fields.notes: Converted into stat output by CHAR_UpdateAttrFromMonster.

fields.name: monster_scaled_u8_0x11
fields.notes: Converted into stat output by CHAR_UpdateAttrFromMonster.

fields.name: monster_scaled_u8_0x12
fields.notes: Converted into stat output by CHAR_UpdateAttrFromMonster.

fields.name: monster_scaled_u8_0x13
fields.notes: Converted into stat output by CHAR_UpdateAttrFromMonster.

fields.name: monster_scaled_u8_0x14
fields.notes: Converted into stat output by CHAR_UpdateAttrFromMonster.

fields.name: mon_skill_start
fields.notes: Start index into MONSKILLBASE for monster AI skills.

fields.name: mon_skill_count
fields.notes: Number of MONSKILLBASE rows linked from the monster record.

fields.name: monster_u8_0x24
fields.notes: Consumed directly from MONDATABASE+0x24.

fields.name: action_id
fields.notes: Action/skill id copied into the learned monster skill entry.

fields.name: unit_start
fields.notes: Start index into BUFFUNITBASE.

fields.name: unit_count
fields.notes: Number of BUFFUNITBASE rows referenced by the buff.

fields.name: target_kind
fields.notes: Filter byte checked before applying the buff-unit effect.

fields.name: target_attr_id
fields.notes: Attribute id matched against the requested attribute update.

fields.name: operation
fields.notes: Operation selector forwarded into UTIL_Calculate.

fields.name: formula_text_id_e
fields.notes: Expression text id resolved through MEMORYTEXT_GetText_E.

fields.name: name_text_id
fields.notes: Primary skill/action name text id.

fields.name: action_kind
fields.notes: Read before AI-specific action filtering.

fields.name: flags
fields.notes: Bit 2 is checked while composing the skill description UI.

fields.name: act_unit_count
fields.notes: Loop count forwarded to ACTDATA_GetActUnit.

fields.name: desc_style
fields.notes: Signed style byte used while assembling description text.

fields.name: reward_start
fields.notes: Start index into QUESTREWARDBASE.

fields.name: reward_count
fields.notes: Number of QUESTREWARDBASE rows linked to the quest.

fields.name: item_id
fields.notes: Item id awarded by the reward entry.

fields.name: quantity
fields.notes: Item quantity awarded by the reward entry.

fields.name: class_mask
fields.notes: Bit mask checked against the main player's class before granting the reward.
